title: Greenpill Brasil GG20 Climate Round Milestones
dek: KarmaGAP marks Greenpill Brasil's GG20 Climate Round milestones complete for biodiversity restoration and native bee pollination.
excerpt: A source-backed Brasil story for the chapter, Library, and future impact surfaces.
body:
Greenpill Brasil has strong public proof through KarmaGAP, Gitcoin, and the Regen Coordination Hub.

The seed should use the completed GG20 Climate Round milestones as the launch-safe proof point. The research artifact also mentions meeting-hour and contributor-count claims from Gitcoin self-reporting, but those should receive steward signoff before being promoted as launch copy.

## Sources

- S018: https://www.karmahq.xyz/project/greenpill-brasil
- S019: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/greenpill-brasil/44
- S020: https://checker.gitcoin.co/public/project/show/greenpill-brazil
author: Greenpill Network research

media.imageAlt: Greenpill Brasil community members gathered around a table.
